pi_items.source: setup_task.sh explicitly uses this directory as the destination path.
Verified by checking the host filesystem that the directory exists in the environment's data folder which maps to /workspace/data.
Verified by running 'find' on the source code which confirms this exact directory structure under app/src/main/java.
Verified by reading app/build.gradle.kts which sets both namespace and applicationId to this value.

privileged_info_summary: Verified that the task operates on a synthetically stripped-down version of the SunflowerApp. The app is correctly copied from the source directory to /home/ga/AndroidStudioProjects/SunflowerApp during setup, and its package name and source directory structure exactly match com.google.samples.apps.sunflower.
